title: Nucleic acids extraction from single cell using MasterPure Complete DNA and RNA purification (Epicenter)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9e1um","text":"Radiolaria are protists which can't be cultivated. These microoganisms have to be isolated by single-cell for genetic identification and it can be difficult to get clean DNA.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9j5lk","text":"Here we optimized a DNA extraction protocol from protist single-cell.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5qi4t","text":"It works very well on single-cell Radiolaria, Foraminifers, but also Ciliates, Dinoflagelletes, Diatoms.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"aufh1","text":"Prepare Ethanol 70% from absolute Ethanol : Mix 35 mL of absolute Ethanol with 15 mL nuclease-free water in a Falcon 50mL Store at -20°C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

FV-96410-17","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":71,"length":11}],"data":[]},{"key":"dbhns","text":"-  StereoMicroscope or binocular microscope.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c9kdf","text":"-  Petridishes Diameter 70mm.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"coi79","text":"-  Centrifuge 5417R (Eppendorf)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d45cr","text":"-  Thermomixer Eppendorf","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2u5n2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"alu68","text":"Kit, Reagents and Chemicals :","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1na63","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"770rh","text":"- MasterPure Complete DNA and RNA purification (Epicenter Illumina, ref MC85200)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":45}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bnop1","text":"Enzymes (Proteinase K, RNase, DNase) are stored at -20°C","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cqh1s","text":"Other reagents from the kit are stored at room temperature.","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fbrvm","text":"- Ethanol absolute, molecular biogy quality. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4m7s4","text":"- Propan-2-ol quality molecular biology.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5p8hh","text":"- 0,22µm filtered Seawater or artificial Seawater.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7jbmh","text":"- Ice for enzyme storage during labwork.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cafgf","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"778B7ACB6F8611EAAAAB0242AC110003","url":"https://www.coleparmer.fr/i/masterflex-l-s-high-performance-precision-pump-tubing-platinum-cured-silicone-l-s-15-25-ft/9641015"}}}}
steps: Isolate individually protist cells (at least 50µm in length) using a glass bent micropipette under a binocular microscope.
Wash each cell in three successive baths of 0.22µm-filtered and sterile seawater.
Transfer subsequently cells in a 1.5mL sterile microtube.
Add 30 μL of lysis buffer (Tissue and Cell Lysis Solution from MasterPureTM DNA and RNA Purification Kit, Epicenter) and store at -20°C for barcoding treatment / -80°C for meta-omics treatment.
Pellet cells by centrifugation (2 min at Vmax), throw the supernatant, let ~25-30 µL of liquid.
Dilute 1 µL of Proteinase K in 300 µL de lysis solution Tissue et Cellule for each sample. Vortex 10 sec for resuspending cells (facultative).
Add 300 µL of mix Proteinase K + lysis solution Tissue et Cellule in each sample. Vortex.
Incubate 15 min at 65°C , 1000 rpm. Put samples in ice 3-5 min.

Add 150 µL MPC reagent to 300 µL of lysed sample. Vortex. 4-+ 500 µL Propan-2-ol. Mix per inversion. 5- 6 7-+ 500 µL d’EtOH 70%. Don’t vortex, mix gently the support. Spin 5min at Vmax ;at 12°C. 8-Discard a maximum of supernatant with precaution, without touching the pellet. 9-Let dry 5-10 min at RT. 10-
Spin 10 min at 11 000 g, 12°C. If there is no pellet, add more 25 µL MPC buffer and spin again 10 min at 11 000 g, 12°C.
Transfer the supernatant ion a new clean microtube (1,5 mL), discard the pellet. (To keep the squeletton, keep the tube with the pellet, add 500 µL MilliQ Water and store at -20°C).
Add 500 µL of Isopropanol. Mix per inversion. Spin 10min at Vmax, 12°C.
Discard the supernatant with precaution, without touching the pellet.
Add 500 µL of Ethanol 70%. Don’t vortex, mix gently the support. Spin 5min at Vmax ;at 12°C.
Discard a maximum of supernatant with precaution, without touching the pellet.
Let dry 5-10 min at room temperature..
Elute in 25 µL of TE1x buffer. Vortex and spin shortly. Store at - 80°C.
creator: Sarah Romac
